subcodes.first_line: O thou tested servant of God! What thou hadst written to Aqa Mirza Asadu'llah hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده ممتحن الهی آنچه باقا میرزا اسدالله مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید فی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @love of God, @mystical themes
